name: inter_unconditional
description: Callee unconditionally returns None; caller subscript-dereferences the result. Tests summary-based interprocedural flow.
analysis_note: fetch_config: Return(Literal(Nullable)) → base_return=Nullable. load_settings: Assign(config, Call{fetch_config}) → apply_summary → Nullable. Consumer(config, Subscript) fires.
task: fetch_config() returns None (not yet implemented). load_settings() assigns its return value to config and immediately subscripts it. Add a None check before accessing config["debug"].
